currentStateNotes: This checkpoint freezes the Phase 1 release train and compatibility policy but does not execute version bumps.
The repository remains not yet certifiably fully featured and not yet fully Markdown spec compliant.
Packed tarball install validation is frozen as a required release gate, but the final dedicated install-evidence lane remains a later closure item.
